author: IGN YouTube
text:
No Rest for the Wicked - Official Founder's Pack Rewards Trailer
Check out the latest No Rest for the Wicked trailer for the action RPG to see the details of what's available in the Early Access Founders pack, including a new secret hideout, a new sword, a custom founders tag, and access to an exclusive public beta test realm. 

No Rest for the Wicked is currently in Early Access, and version 1.0 will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5) and PC via Steam in October 2026. It will be available on Xbox Series X/S and Nintendo Switch 2 at a later date.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Microsoft Announces Significant Price Rises for Xbox - IGN Daily Fix
Microsoft has announced significant price rises for Xbox consoles, blaming the ongoing “components crisis.” Plus, Destiny developer Bungie will lose a "significant number of employees" as part of brutal-sounding layoffs that will include "most of the Destiny team and some Marathon team members." Daemon has all that and more in your Daily Fix!

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Star Fox on Nintendo Switch 2 - How to Unlock EVERY Alternate Path
Star Fox for the Nintendo Switch 2 brings back the classic branching pathways of the beloved N64 original, but discovering every hidden route requires sharp shooting and quick reflexes. Whether you’re trying to keep Slippy out of trouble against Spyborg, blasting through warp rings in Meteo, or figuring out the notorious train lock puzzle on Macbeth, uncovering all 16 stages takes precision. A single playthrough will only show you a fraction of the Lylat system, so taking advantage of these hidden triggers is essential if you want to see everything the campaign has to offer.

Star Fox Wiki: https://www.ign.com/wikis/star-fox/All_Alternate_Routes

0:00 Intro
1:39 Corneria
2:43 Meteo
3:43 Sector Y
4:30 Fichina
4:59 Katina
5:30 Aquas
5:54 Sector X
8:19 Solar
8:28 Zoness
9:12 Titania
9:31 Macbeth
11:26 Sector Z
11:59 Bolse
12:25 Area 6
12:38 Venom
13:18 Conclusion

#IGN #Gaming #Nintendo

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Invincible VS - Official Immortal Deep Dive Trailer
Check out the Immortal Deep Dive Trailer for Invincible VS, the hit fighting game based on the comic and Prime Video series developed by Quarter Up. Players can hear from the development team on the process of bringing Immortal to the game, the warrior who had fought, died, and came back century after century. See how players can utilize his signature revival ability and powerful attacks as Immortal in Invincible VS, launching on June 30 with Season 1 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Xbox Cloud, and PC (Steam and Xbox Cloud).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Onimusha: Way of the Sword - Official Game Overview Trailer | Capcom Spotlight June 2026
Take a look at the Game Overview Trailer for Onimusha: Way of the Sword, the latest installment in the action samurai RPG developed by Capcom. Players can get the rundown on key gameplay features, Musashi's skills, and more to engage with in the ultimate struggle against Genma, Dohatsu-ten. Onimusha: Way of the Sword is launching on September 25 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, Nintendo Switch 2, and PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, and Xbox on PC).

#IGN #Capcom #SummerOfGaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Capcom Spotlight｜June 2026
The Capcom Spotlight is a digital event that brings you the latest news from Capcom! In the upcoming show, they'll be covering updates to games that are out now, plus new info on upcoming titles. Some featured games include Monster Hunter Stories 3: Twisted Reflection, Onimusha: Way of the Sword, and Dragon's Dogma 2: Dark Arisen. The broadcast is planned to be approximately 30 minutes and begins at June 25 at 2pm PT.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Lazy River - Official Announcement Trailer
Take a look at the announcement trailer for Lazy River, a co-op first-person shooter set at the galaxy's most unregulated waterpark, Water Station One. The water park is connected by an infinite lazy river that runs the length of the park. You and your friends are at the park for a fun vacation, but some guy peed in the pool and the pee mixed with the space water and turned all the guests into zombies that want to kill you. You’ll need to build a raft and ride the Lazy River to the other end of the park to escape. Lazy River is coming soon to PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 First Impressions: Our 10-Year Wait Is Over!
Dragon Ball Xenoverse veteran Will Borger joins IGN's Ryan McCaffrey to give his first impressions of Dragon Ball Xenoverse 3 after getting to play the long-awaited action/brawler follow-up after waiting a decade since Xenoverse 2.

#DragonBallXenoverse3 #Gaming #IGN

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Starship Troopers: Extermination - Official 'Hit the Shower' Update 11 Launch Trailer
Take a look at the 'Hit the Shower' Update 11 Launch Trailer for Starship Troopers: Extermination, the hit first-person sci-fi action co-op shooter developed by Offworld. Players can now access the latest update to the game, bringing new content additions, performance and optimization improvements, and the inclusion of the Field Shower to extinguish a burning Trooper, wash all blood, guts, and gore off their uniform, and provide a method of Health restoration. The 'Hit the Shower' Update 11 for Starship Troopers: Extermination is available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Virtua Fighter Crossroads - Official Adventure Overview Trailer
Get a deep dive into the world and adventure of Virtua Fighter Crossroads in this latest trailer for the upcoming fighting game.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
AION 2 - Official 'Welcome to Atreia' Update Overview
Don't miss the 'Welcome to Atreia' Developer Update for AION 2, the hit free-to-play MMO RPG developed by NC. Players will hear from key members of the development team on laying out information on new content coming to AION 2, how it ties into the original game, flight and combat, dungeons, character creation, pets, and more. AION 2 is launching in September 2026 for PC (Steam and Purple).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
CLUTCH Early Gameplay Livestream with Maverick Games
Join key members of the CLUTCH development team, Creative Director Mike Brown, Art Director Ben Penrose and Content Curator Andrew Baranowski, for a live look at early gameplay and a Q&A as they answer players' biggest questions following the game's reveal at Summer Game Fest.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Prehistoric Kingdom - Official Update 17 Launch Trailer
Watch the latest Prehistoric Kingdom trailer for the zoo management simulation game to see what to expect with Update 17, which brings dynamic combat and hunting systems, along with new areas like breakrooms and workzones. The free content update also features new dinosaurs: Allosaurus, Pachycephalosaurus, and Stegosaurus. New environments are also available as part of this new update for Prehistoric Kingdom. Prehistoric Kingdom is available now in early access, and Update 17 is out now.
